tools.name: post_rates_prebook

tools.name: post_rates_book
tools.description:

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "get_data_places_placeid" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: ## Overview Get detailed information about a specific place using its Place ID. Returns complete place details including boundaries and location information. **…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "post_flights_prebooks_prebookid_services" references sensitive artifacts (secret). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.
